name: ai-evaluator
description: AI Governance Framework - CV Portfolio Project

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter shared-types build && concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "pnpm --filter evaluator-service dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared-types build && pnpm --filter evaluator-service build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.build:frontend: pnpm --filter shared-types build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.build:evaluator: pnpm --filter shared-types build && pnpm --filter evaluator-service build
